title: Active Ads
formula: Active Ads = count of distinct ad IDs that served ≥1 impression in the period (Google + Meta combined)

title: Active Audiences
formula: Active Audiences = count of distinct audience IDs with activity in the period (Google ad groups + Meta ad sets)

title: Active Campaigns
depends_on: google_ads.spend; meta_ads.spend; google_ads.conversion_value; meta_ads.conversion_value; google_ads.impressions; meta_ads.impressions; google_ads.clicks; meta_ads.clicks
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/campaign_matrix.py:281-368 (_fetch_period_summary: COUNT(DISTINCT CAMPAIGN_ID), WHERE SPEND>0 OR CONVERSION_VALUE>0 OR IMPRESSIONS>0 OR CLICKS>0), :601-631 (_build_active_campaigns_metric)
formula: Active Campaigns = count of distinct campaigns with any activity (spend, revenue, impressions, or clicks) in the period, across Google + Meta

title: Audience Conversions
formula: Audience Conversions = sum of conversions credited to audience-targeted campaigns over the period (Google + Meta)

title: Budget at Risk
formula: Budget at Risk = total spend on campaigns in the Optimize/Cut quadrant (high spend, low ROAS); % of Total = budget at risk ÷ total spend × 100

title: Days Until Budget Exhaustion
formula: Days until budget exhaustion = budget remaining ÷ daily run rate. Daily run rate = average daily total spend over the selected date range. Budget remaining = monthly budget − month-to-date spend. Compared against days left in the month to flag exhaustion risk.

title: Blended CAC
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/customer_acquisition.py:659-691 (get_blended_cac_current: SUM(SPEND) from MART_MARKETING_DAILY / SUM(NEW_CUSTOMERS) from MART_CUSTOMER_ACQUISITION)
formula: Blended CAC = total ad spend (Google + Meta) ÷ new customers acquired

title: CAC Efficiency
formula: CAC Efficiency = first-purchase AOV ÷ blended CAC (ratio above 1 means the first order alone recoups acquisition cost)

title: Site Conversion Rate
formula: Site Conversion Rate = orders ÷ website sessions × 100; Change % vs comparison period

title: Total Conversions
formula: Total Conversions = sum of platform-reported conversions across Google + Meta

title: Average CPA
depends_on: blended.total_ad_spend; blended.conversions; google_ads.spend; meta_ads.spend; google_ads.conversions; meta_ads.conversions
formula: Average CPA = (Google spend + Meta spend) ÷ total platform-reported conversions

title: Blended CTR
formula: Blended CTR = total clicks ÷ total impressions × 100 (impression-weighted across Google + Meta)

title: GA4 vs Magento Gap
formula: GA4 vs Magento Gap = total GA4 revenue − Magento store revenue; Gap % = gap ÷ Magento revenue × 100

title: Google Attribution Gap
formula: Google Attribution Gap = Google platform-reported revenue − GA4 Google revenue; Gap % = gap ÷ GA4 Google revenue × 100

title: Klaviyo Attribution Gap
formula: Klaviyo Attribution Gap = Klaviyo self-reported revenue − GA4 email revenue; Gap % = gap ÷ GA4 email revenue × 100

title: Marketing Efficiency Ratio (MER)
formula: MER (Marketing Efficiency Ratio) = net revenue ÷ total ad spend (Google + Meta), 0 when spend is 0

title: Meta Attribution Gap
formula: Meta Attribution Gap = Meta platform-reported revenue − GA4 Meta revenue; Gap % = gap ÷ GA4 Meta revenue × 100

title: Month End Revenue Projection
formula: Projected month-end revenue = month-to-date revenue + (average daily revenue × days left), using paid-media conversion value. Current ROAS = period revenue ÷ period spend; projected ROAS = projected revenue ÷ projected spend.

title: Month End Spend Projection
formula: Projected month-end spend. Simple projection = month-to-date spend + (average daily spend × days left). Weighted projection = MTD spend + (weekday average × weekdays left) + (weekend average × weekends left). Confidence range = MTD spend + ((average daily ± standard deviation) × days left).

title: Optimize/Cut Campaigns
formula: Optimize/Cut Campaigns = count of campaigns with spend ≥ median spend and ROAS < median ROAS (medians taken over campaigns with positive spend and ROAS)

title: Purchase Reconciliation
formula: Purchase Reconciliation Delta = GA4 purchases − Magento orders; Gap % = delta ÷ Magento orders × 100

title: Revenue Reconciliation
formula: Revenue Reconciliation headline = total Magento store revenue (source of truth), with gap percentages versus platform-reported and GA4-attributed revenue

title: Blended ROAS
dashboards: annual-planning; audience-performance; campaign-matrix; ceo-pulse; creative-performance; marketing-mix; ml-marketing-mix; ml-marketing-mix-campaign; quarterly-review; weekly-exec
depends_on: blended.total_ad_spend; google_ads.conversion_value; meta_ads.conversion_value; ga4.revenue; magento.net_revenue; google_ads.spend; meta_ads.spend
formula: Blended ROAS = total incremental revenue ÷ total media spend across all channels (0 when spend = 0)

title: Scale Campaigns
formula: Scale Campaigns = count of campaigns with spend ≥ median spend and ROAS ≥ median ROAS (medians taken over campaigns with positive spend and ROAS)

title: Scale Opportunity Campaigns
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/campaign_matrix.py:312-345 (with_quadrants: spend=0 AND revenue>0 OR spend<median AND roas>=median -> 'Scale Opportunity'), :750-810 (_build_quadrant_metrics)
formula: Scale Opportunity Campaigns = count of campaigns with spend < median spend and ROAS ≥ median ROAS (also includes campaigns with zero spend but positive revenue); medians over campaigns with positive spend and ROAS

title: Test/Kill Campaigns
formula: Test/Kill Campaigns = count of campaigns with spend < median spend and ROAS < median ROAS (medians taken over campaigns with positive spend and ROAS)

title: Total Ad Spend
dashboards: annual-planning; audience-performance; campaign-matrix; creative-performance; marketing-mix; ml-marketing-mix; ml-marketing-mix-campaign; quarterly-review; weekly-exec
formula: Total Media Spend = sum of paid media spend across all channels (Google Ads + Meta Ads + Email) in the attribution period

title: YoY Revenue Change
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/annual_planning.py:1234-1315 (get_kpis: actual_revenue from MART_CEO_DAILY_PULSE NET_REVENUE, yoy_change), :233-255 (_build_yoy_change_metric); legacy get_yoy_change_metric:573-630 uses MART_ANNUAL_PLANNING_SUMMARY.annual_revenue
formula: YoY Change % = (most recent completed year revenue − prior year revenue) ÷ prior year revenue × 100

title: Estimated Orders
formula: Weekly Orders (estimated) = weekly revenue ÷ $50 assumed average order value; WoW Change % = revenue WoW

title: Gross Margin
formula: Gross Margin % (estimated) = (net revenue × 50% assumed COGS − total ad spend) ÷ net revenue × 100

title: LTV:CAC Ratio
depends_on: magento.net_revenue; magento.orders; blended.total_ad_spend; ga4.new_users; google_ads.spend; meta_ads.spend
formula: LTV:CAC = estimated LTV ÷ CAC, where LTV = (net revenue ÷ orders) × 1.5 and CAC = total ad spend ÷ new users

title: Projected Revenue
depends_on: blended.total_ad_spend; google_ads.roas; meta_ads.roas; google_ads.spend; meta_ads.spend; google_ads.conversion_value; meta_ads.conversion_value
formula: Projected Revenue = (Google budget × Google ROAS) + (Meta budget × Meta ROAS) + (Email budget × Email ROAS), where budget split is 52% Google / 46% Meta / 2% Email and channel ROAS are prior-year actuals (Email fixed at 25x)

title: Revenue per Session
formula: Revenue per Session = revenue ÷ sessions over the period

title: Average Item Price
formula: Avg Product Price = product revenue ÷ units sold (over the selected period)

title: Avg Revenue Per New Product
formula: Avg Revenue Per Product = total revenue from new products ÷ count of distinct new products (each new product's activity from its launch date through the end date)

title: Bounce Rate
formula: Bounce Rate = (1 − engaged sessions ÷ sessions) × 100 (weighted across the period)

title: Cart Abandonment Rate
formula: Cart Abandonment Rate = (add-to-carts − purchases) ÷ add-to-carts × 100

title: Cart-to-Purchase Rate
formula: Cart-to-Purchase Rate = average across qualifying products of (each product's units purchased ÷ its cart adds) × 100, over the last 30 days, limited to items with 50–10,000 cart adds and at least one purchase

title: Checkout Completion Rate
formula: Checkout Completion Rate = purchases ÷ begun checkouts × 100

title: Declining Items
formula: Declining Items = count of distinct products whose current-week units purchased fell below half of their level four weeks earlier, among items that had more than 20 purchases four weeks ago (fixed trailing 60-day window anchored to today, independent of the dashboard date filter)

title: Direct Traffic Share
formula: Direct Traffic Share = GA4 Direct revenue ÷ total GA4 revenue × 100

title: Engagement Rate
formula: Engagement Rate = (engaged sessions ÷ sessions) × 100 (weighted across the period)

title: Conversion Rate (estimated)
formula: Conversion Rate (estimated) = engaged sessions ÷ sessions × 100 × 0.1 (engaged-session proxy); WoW Change %

title: Est. Lost Revenue
formula: Estimated Lost Revenue = sum over items with >50 cart adds of (benchmark conversion − item's own conversion) × the item's cart adds × the item's price, over the last 30 days, where benchmark conversion = average of units purchased ÷ cart adds across all items with >50 adds, and price = item revenue ÷ units purchased (falling back to the catalog average price when the item has no purchases)

title: Funnel Drop Rate
formula: Funnel Drop Rate = (1 − purchase events ÷ add-to-cart events) × 100, sitewide over the last 30 days

title: Items At Risk
formula: Items At Risk = count of distinct products with zero units purchased but more than 50 cart adds (cart adds capped below 10,000 to exclude anomalies) over the last 30 days

title: New Products Launched
formula: New Products Launched = count of distinct products whose first-ever appearance falls within the launch window (placeholder IDs '(not set)' and '(other)' excluded; a product launches on its earliest activity date)

title: New Products Revenue
formula: Total Revenue = sum of revenue across all new products from each product's launch date through the end date (new product = first appearance within the launch window, placeholders excluded)

title: New Product Success Rate
formula: Success Rate = (count of new products that earned any revenue since launch ÷ total new products in the window) × 100

title: Total Paid Revenue
formula: Total Paid Revenue = sum of GA4 revenue for all sessions whose medium is cpc or paid

title: Product Conversion Rate
formula: Conversion Rate = (units purchased ÷ units viewed) × 100

title: Product Revenue
formula: Total Revenue = sum of product revenue over the selected period

title: Total GA4 Revenue
formula: Weekly Revenue = GA4 channel-attributed revenue across all channels for the week; WoW Change %

title: Conversion Rate
formula: Conversion Rate = purchases ÷ sessions × 100

title: Sessions
formula: Sessions = sum of website sessions over the period

title: True OOS Count
formula: True OOS Count = count of distinct products with zero units purchased but more than 100 cart adds (cart adds capped below 10,000) over the last 30 days — a stricter bar than Items At Risk

title: Units Sold
formula: Units Sold = sum of units purchased over the selected period

title: Users
formula: Users = sum of unique users over the period

title: Below Top Position Rate
formula: Below Top Position % = 100 − top-position rate, where top-position rate = impression-weighted average of the share of impressions landing above organic results

title: Clicks
formula: Clicks = total Google Ads clicks over the selected period

title: Conversions
formula: Conversions = total conversions attributed to Google Ads campaigns over the selected period

title: CPA
formula: CPA = total Google Ads spend ÷ total conversions

title: Impressions
formula: Impressions = total Google Ads ad impressions over the selected period

title: Position Gap Rate
formula: Position Gap % = top-position rate − absolute-top (#1) rate (both impression-weighted)

title: ROAS
formula: ROAS = total conversion value ÷ total Google Ads spend

title: Spend
formula: Spend = total Google Ads spend across all campaigns over the selected period

title: Top Position Rate
formula: Top-position rate card: impression-weighted percentage of impressions appearing above organic results = sum of (top-position rate × impressions) ÷ total impressions across the period, with a weekly trend sparkline. Metadata also carries the absolute-top (#1) rate.

title: Performance Max Conversion Value
formula: Conversion Value = total conversion value from Performance Max campaigns over the selected period

title: Performance Max Conversions
formula: Conversions = total conversions from Performance Max campaigns over the selected period

title: Performance Max CPA
formula: CPA = Performance Max spend ÷ Performance Max conversions

title: Performance Max ROAS
formula: ROAS = Performance Max conversion value ÷ Performance Max spend

title: Performance Max Spend
formula: Spend = total Performance Max spend over the selected period

title: Search Clicks
formula: Search Clicks = total clicks on Google Search campaigns over the selected period

title: Search Conversions
formula: Search Conversions = total conversions from Google Search campaigns over the selected period

title: Search Quality Score
formula: Quality Score = average Quality Score (1-10) across scored Search keywords

title: Search ROAS
formula: Search ROAS = Search conversion value ÷ Search spend

title: Search Spend
formula: Search Spend = total spend on Google Search campaigns over the selected period

title: Shopping Campaigns with Spend
formula: Campaigns with Spend = count of distinct Shopping campaigns with spend > 0 over the period (compared against total Shopping campaigns)

title: Shopping Revenue (Conversion Value)
formula: Shopping Revenue = total conversion value from Shopping campaigns over the selected period

title: Shopping ROAS
formula: Shopping ROAS = Shopping conversion value ÷ Shopping spend

title: Shopping Spend
formula: Shopping Spend = total spend on Shopping campaigns over the selected period

title: YouTube Conversion Value
formula: Conversion Value = total conversion value from YouTube/Video campaigns over the selected period

title: YouTube Conversions
formula: Conversions = total conversions from YouTube/Video campaigns over the selected period

title: YouTube Cost Per View
formula: Cost Per View = total YouTube spend ÷ total video views

title: YouTube Impressions
formula: Impressions = total ad impressions across YouTube/Video campaigns over the selected period

title: YouTube (Video) ROAS
formula: Video ROAS = YouTube conversion value ÷ YouTube spend

title: YouTube Spend
formula: Total Spend = total spend on YouTube/Video campaigns over the selected period

title: YouTube Video Views
formula: Video Views = total video views across YouTube/Video campaigns over the selected period

title: YouTube View Rate
formula: View Rate = total video views ÷ total impressions × 100

title: Active Flows
formula: Active Flows = count of distinct automation flows in live status that sent during the period

title: Email Bounce Rate
formula: Bounce Rate = bounced emails ÷ emails sent × 100

title: Email Click Rate
formula: Click Rate = unique clicks ÷ emails sent × 100

title: Email Click-to-Open Rate (CTOR)
formula: Click-to-Open Rate = unique clicks ÷ unique opens × 100

title: Emails Sent
formula: Emails Sent = total emails sent over the period

title: Email Open Rate
formula: Open Rate = unique opens ÷ emails sent × 100

title: Email Unsubscribe Rate
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/churn_analysis/metrics/service.py:82-93 (unsubscribe-rate = unsubscribed_count / total_customers); backend/app/repositories/churn_analysis.py:275 (EMAIL_UNSUBSCRIBED from MART_KLAVIYO_LIST_HEALTH), :261 (TOTAL_CUSTOMERS = COUNT(*) MART_CUSTOMER_HEALTH)
formula: Unsubscribe Rate = email unsubscribes ÷ total customers × 100%

title: SMS Click Rate
formula: SMS Click Rate = distinct clicked SMS ÷ distinct received SMS × 100

title: SMS Revenue
formula: SMS Revenue = total Placed Order value attributed to SMS engagement

title: Revenue per SMS
formula: Revenue per SMS = SMS-attributed revenue ÷ total SMS received

title: SMS Sent
formula: SMS Sent = count of distinct received SMS messages over the period

title: SMS Unsubscribe Rate
formula: SMS Unsubscribe Rate = distinct SMS opt-out events ÷ distinct received SMS × 100

title: Active Customers
formula: Active Customers = count of distinct customers (with ≥1 order) whose most recent order is within 90 days of the period end. Active Rate = active customers ÷ total customers × 100

title: Active Customers (30d)
formula: Active Customers = count of purchasing customers whose most recent order is within the trailing 30 days

title: Average Order Value
dashboards: ceo-pulse; cro; customer-journey; funnel; magento-orders-fulfillment; magento-store-overview
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/magento_store_overview.py:664-701 (_build_aov_metric, calculation 'GROSS_REVENUE / TOTAL_ORDERS'); backend/app/repositories/magento_orders_fulfillment.py:768-789; dbt mart_ecom_daily.sql:103-106 (aov = gross_revenue / total_orders)
formula: Average Order Value = revenue ÷ purchases over the period

title: Average Churn Risk Score
formula: Average Churn Probability = average of the per-customer churn-risk score (0-100) across all customers that existed by the end of the period

title: Avg Days Between Orders
formula: Avg Days Between Orders = average customer lifespan in days (first-to-last order gap), averaged across customers with ≥1 order

title: Avg Days Between Orders
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/magento_customer_analytics.py:198-210 (_build_avg_days_between_orders_metric, 'AVG(AVG_DAYS_BETWEEN_ORDERS)'), :361-370 (weighted avg over rows where value>0); dbt mart_customer_segments_daily.sql:86 (avg(case when days_since_prev_order > 0 then days_since_prev_order end))
formula: Avg Days Between Orders = average of the daily per-segment average gap between a customer's orders, over rows that have a positive value

title: Average Health Score
formula: Average Health Score = average of the per-customer health score (0-100) across scored customers

title: Avg Items per Order
formula: Avg Items per Order = total items ordered ÷ total orders (over the period)

title: Avg Orders per Customer
formula: Avg Orders per Customer = total orders ÷ unique customers

title: Average Rating
formula: Average Rating = average of each day's average star rating (1-5) over the trailing 7 days; change = current 7-day average − prior 7-day average

title: Bundle Penetration
formula: Bundle Penetration = (orders containing a bundle product ÷ total orders) × 100

title: Cancellation Rate
formula: Cancellation Rate = canceled orders ÷ total orders × 100

title: Cart Abandonment Rate
formula: Cart Abandonment Rate = abandoned carts ÷ (abandoned carts + converted carts) × 100

title: Average CLV
formula: Average LTV = gross revenue ÷ unique customers

title: CLV at Risk
formula: CLV at Risk = sum of net lifetime value of customers at High or Critical churn-risk level (churn-risk score ≥ 60); percentage = at-risk CLV ÷ total portfolio CLV × 100

title: CLV at Risk (Critical)
formula: CLV at Risk = sum of net lifetime value of customers at Critical churn-risk level (churn-risk score ≥ 80)

title: Completed Orders
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/magento_orders_fulfillment.py:698-717 (_build_completed_orders_metric, 'SUM(COMPLETED_ORDERS)'); backend/app/repositories/magento_store_overview.py:141 (SUM(COMPLETED_ORDERS)); dbt mart_ecom_daily.sql:73 / mart_orders_fulfillment_daily.sql:45 (count distinct order_id where order_status='complete')
formula: Completed Orders = count of orders that reached the completed status over the period

title: Critical Risk Customers
formula: Critical Risk Customers = count of customers at Critical churn-risk level (churn-risk score ≥ 80)

title: Customers with CLV
formula: Customers with CLV = count of acquisition-cohort customers that have a non-null lifetime value

title: Customers with Scores
formula: Customers with Scores = count of customers that have a computed health score

title: First Purchase AOV
formula: First Purchase AOV = total first-order revenue ÷ new customers acquired

title: Gross Revenue
formula: Total Revenue = sum of gross order revenue over the period

title: Guest Checkout Rate
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/magento_customer_analytics.py:212-224 (_build_guest_checkout_rate_metric), :528-575 (_fetch_guest_checkout_rate, 'SUM(CASE WHEN customer_type=guest THEN total_orders) / SUM(total_orders) * 100'); dbt mart_ecom_daily.sql:55-59 (customer_type classification), :72 (total_orders)
formula: Guest Checkout Rate = orders placed by guest customers ÷ total orders × 100

title: High-Risk Customers
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/churn_analysis.py:266 (COUNT(CASE WHEN churn_risk_level IN High/Critical) as HIGH_RISK_CUSTOMERS)
formula: High-Risk Customers = count of customers at High or Critical churn-risk level (churn-risk score ≥ 60); percentage = high-risk count ÷ customers with a prediction × 100

title: Conversion Rate
formula: Conversion Rate = converting touchpoints ÷ all journey touchpoints × 100

title: Engagement Rate
formula: Engagement Rate = touchpoints with a non-zero value ÷ all journey touchpoints × 100 (proxy for engagement, not a native field)

title: Total Sessions
formula: Total Sessions = count of journey touchpoint rows in the period (each order touchpoint counts as one session)

title: Total Users
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/customer_journey.py:436 (COUNT(DISTINCT CUSTOMER_ID) as CURRENT_VALUE for users KPI)
formula: Total Users = count of distinct customers appearing in the journey data during the period

title: Median CLV
formula: Median CLV = midpoint (50th-percentile) realized lifetime value across acquisition-cohort customers

title: Net Revenue
dashboards: ceo-pulse; cro; customer-journey; funnel; monthly-review; quarterly-review; website-performance
formula: Quarterly Revenue = total net revenue (Magento) for the quarter; YoY Growth % vs the same quarter last year

title: New Customer Revenue %
formula: New Customer Revenue % = new-customer orders ÷ total orders × 100 (order-share proxy)

title: New Customers
formula: New Customers = count of first-time customers acquired over the period

title: NPS Score
formula: NPS Score = average product-review star rating (1-5) over the period, used as a satisfaction proxy (not a true -100..+100 NPS); change = current average − prior average

title: Total Orders
formula: Today's Orders = total orders over the selected period; Change % vs comparison period

title: Predicted CLV
formula: Predicted CLV = sum of realized (actual) lifetime value across the acquisition cohort — placeholder; no forward-looking prediction exists in the mart, so it equals Total CLV

title: Processing Orders
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/magento_orders_fulfillment.py:719-737 (_build_processing_orders_metric, 'TOTAL_ORDERS - COMPLETED_ORDERS - CANCELED_ORDERS'), :599-616 (_calculate_order_totals omits CANCELED_ORDERS so .get default 0); dbt mart_ecom_daily.sql:72-73 (total_orders, completed_orders)
formula: Processing Orders = max(0, total orders − completed orders) — orders received but not yet completed (no separate canceled-order count is available, so canceled is treated as 0)

title: Promoters %
formula: Promoters % = reviews rated 4 or 5 stars ÷ all rated reviews × 100%; change = current % − prior %

title: Refund Rate
formula: Refund Rate = refunded orders ÷ total orders × 100

title: Repeat Purchase Rate
formula: Repeat Rate = repeat customers ÷ unique customers × 100

title: Returning Customers
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/customer_overview.py:446-450 (RETURNING_CUSTOMERS = COUNT DISTINCT first_order_date < date_from AND last_order_date >= date_from)
formula: Returning Customers = count of distinct customers acquired before the period who placed an order within the period. Retention Rate = returning customers ÷ total customers × 100

title: Survey Responses
formula: Survey Responses = count of rated reviews (rating above zero) submitted in the period; change % = (current − previous) ÷ previous × 100

title: Top Affinity Lift
formula: Top Affinity Lift = highest lift score among product pairs with at least 5 co-purchases, where lift = probability of buying A and B together ÷ (probability of A × probability of B)

title: Total CLV
formula: Total CLV = sum of net lifetime value across all purchasing customers active in the period

title: Total Customers
formula: Total Customers = count of distinct customers with ≥1 order who had any order activity overlapping the selected period

title: Unique Customers
formula: Active Customers = count of unique customers who ordered over the period

title: Units Sold
formula: Units Sold = total product units sold over the period

title: Meta CPM
formula: CPM = Meta spend ÷ Meta impressions × 1,000

title: Meta Frequency
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/meta_overview.py:99 (ROUND(SUM(IMPRESSIONS) / NULLIF(SUM(REACH), 0), 2) as AVG_FREQUENCY); audience_performance.py:309 (FREQUENCY = META_IMPRESSIONS / META_REACH)

formula: Reach = total unique people who saw the Meta ads at least once over the period

title: Meta ROAS
formula: ROAS = Meta attributed conversion value ÷ Meta spend (7-day click + 1-day view attribution)

title: Meta Total Spend
formula: Total Spend = total Meta advertising spend across all placements over the period

title: Meta Creative Active Creatives
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/meta_creative.py:114-118 (COUNT(DISTINCT CREATIVE_ID) WHERE DATE_DAY >= DATEADD('day',-7,...) AND SPEND > 0); builder meta_creative.py:226 calculation 'COUNT(DISTINCT CREATIVE_ID) WHERE SPEND > 0 in last 7 days'

title: Meta Prospecting Avg Frequency
formula: Avg Frequency = average of daily campaign frequency values across prospecting campaigns

formula: Total Reach = total unique people who saw prospecting ads at least once over the period

title: Meta Prospecting Spend
formula: Total Spend = total Meta advertising spend across all prospecting campaigns over the period

title: Meta Retargeting CTR

title: Meta Retargeting Fatigue
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/meta_retargeting.py:392-394 (CASE WHEN h.CTR > 0 THEN ((h.CTR - c.CTR) / h.CTR) * 100 ... as FATIGUE_SCORE, where CTR = AVG(CTR)); builder meta_retargeting.py:243 _ep07_build_fatigue calculation '((historical_ctr - current_ctr) / historical_ctr) * 100'
formula: Retargeting Fatigue Score = (historical-period CTR − current-period CTR) ÷ historical-period CTR × 100

title: Meta Retargeting ROAS
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/meta_retargeting.py:335-336,352 (SUM(CONVERSIONS_VALUE) as TOTAL_REVENUE; TOTAL_REVENUE / TOTAL_SPEND as AVG_ROAS); builder meta_retargeting.py:155 calculation 'SUM(REVENUE) / SUM(SPEND)'
formula: Retargeting ROAS = Meta retargeting conversion value ÷ retargeting spend

title: Meta Retargeting Spend
source_code_ref: backend/app/repositories/meta_retargeting.py:293 (SUM(...SPEND...) as TOTAL_SPEND), :318 (SUM(SPEND) as SPEND); builder meta_retargeting.py:133 calculation 'SUM(SPEND) WHERE retargeting_filter'
formula: Retargeting Spend = total Meta spend across retargeting campaigns over the period

title: Active Alert Rules
formula: Active Rules = fixed count of enabled alert rules currently monitoring (7)

title: Avg Alert Response Time
formula: Avg Response Time = fixed average minutes to acknowledge alerts (15.5)

title: Average Sync Lag
formula: Average Sync Lag = average across schemas of (current time − most recent Fivetran sync time), in minutes

title: Critical Alerts
formula: Critical Alerts = count of business metrics breaching their critical threshold (today's GA4 revenue < $21,301) + (trailing-7-day Google Ads ROAS < 4.89) + (trailing-7-day Meta Ads CTR < 2.0%)

title: Critical Anomalies
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/data_quality/dashboard/repository.py:317-347 (get_critical_alerts_kpi: COUNT where ABS(sessions z) > 2 OR ABS(revenue z) > 2)
formula: Critical Anomalies = count of days in the trailing 7 days where sessions or revenue z-score exceeds 2 standard deviations from the mean

title: Schema Health
depends_on: source.ga4._fivetran_synced; source.google_ads._fivetran_synced; source.meta_ads._fivetran_synced; source.klaviyo._fivetran_synced; threshold.sync_fresh_60min; threshold.sync_acceptable_360min
formula: Schema Health % = (fresh + acceptable schemas) ÷ total schemas × 100, where fresh = synced < 60 min ago and acceptable = synced 60–360 min ago

title: Tables Monitored
formula: Tables Monitored = count of distinct tables across the GA4, Google Ads, Meta Ads, and Klaviyo source schemas

title: Warning Alerts
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/alerts_config/dashboard/repository.py:30-92 (get_alert_summary: warning_revenue/warning_roas/warning_ctr BETWEEN bands summed into WARNING_ALERTS)
formula: Warning Alerts = count of business metrics in their warning band (today's GA4 revenue in [$21,301, $27,431]) + (trailing-7-day Google Ads ROAS in [4.89, 5.91]) + (trailing-7-day Meta Ads CTR in [2.0%, 2.85%])

title: Forecast New Customers (next 4w)
formula: Forecast New Customers (next 4w) = sum of the predicted new customers across every entry category over the next four weeks

title: Avg / Entry Category
formula: Avg per Entry Category = total forecast new customers ÷ number of forecast entry categories

title: Top-10 Concentration
formula: Top-10 Concentration = forecast new customers of the 10 highest entry categories ÷ total forecast new customers × 100

title: Top Entry Category
formula: Top Entry Category = the entry category with the highest forecast new customers, with its share = that category's forecast ÷ total forecast new customers

title: Actionable Customers
formula: Actionable Customers = count of customers whose predicted intervention propensity is at or above the optimal threshold (≈11.4%)

title: Avg Activation Propensity
formula: Avg Activation Propensity = average predicted first-purchase (activation) propensity across all scored prospects

title: Active Customers
formula: Active Customers = count of customers whose predicted lifecycle stage is 'Active'

title: Predicted Growth vs Past
formula: Predicted Growth vs Past = (predicted average order value − historical average order value) ÷ historical average order value × 100; blank when no historical baseline exists

title: Ascending Customers
formula: Ascending Customers = count of customers predicted to move to a higher value trajectory (predicted class upgrade or big_upgrade)

title: At-Risk Customers
formula: At-Risk Customers = count of customers the lifecycle model flags as at risk of churning in the prediction horizon

title: Paid Revenue
formula: Paid Revenue = sum of model-attributed revenue across all paid channels (Google, Meta, Email)

title: Avg Days Until Risk
formula: Avg Days Until Risk = average projected days-until-stock-out across the Critical/High-risk products

title: Avg Growth Probability
formula: Avg Growth Probability = average model-predicted probability of growing wallet share across all scored customers, shown as a percent

title: Avg Optimal Markdown Depth
formula: Avg Optimal Markdown Depth = average of the model's recommended markdown % across all products

title: Expected Avg Order
formula: Expected Avg Order = mean predicted next order value across all scored customers

title: Avg Seasonality Index
formula: Avg Seasonality Index = average of every category's 12 monthly seasonality index values (index 1.0 = a month at that category's yearly average)

title: Avg Stage Duration
formula: Avg Stage Duration = average number of days customers remain in their current lifecycle stage

title: Best Day of Week
formula: Best Day of Week = the most common predicted best-response weekday across customers (mode of each customer's best day)

title: Multi-Brand Customers
formula: Multi-Brand Customers = count of scored customers the model classifies as Explorers or Switchers (buying across multiple brands)

title: Single Brand Loyalists
formula: Single Brand Loyalists = count of scored customers the model classifies as Loyalists (loyalty type = Loyalist)

title: Brand Switcher Pool
formula: Brand Switcher Pool = count of scored customers the model classifies as brand Switchers (loyalty type = Switcher)

title: Top Brand by Affinity
formula: Top Brand by Affinity = the single brand most frequently identified as a customer's top brand across all scored customers (most common top brand)

title: Break-Even Discount
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/discount_response_predictions/ml_service.py:167-171 (get_dashboard_summary: first row sorted by discount_pct where net_revenue >= 0)
formula: Break-Even Discount = the shallowest discount depth where net revenue first turns non-negative (uplift just covers the discount cost)

title: Categories Forecast
formula: Categories Forecast = count of distinct categories that have a next-4-week buyer forecast

title: Avg / Category
formula: Avg per Category = total forecast buyers ÷ number of forecast categories

title: Top-10 Concentration
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/ml_category_buyer_breadth_forecast/service.py:152-166 (get_forecast points by category, sorted by forecast_buyers); concentration computed in dashboard-v2 forecastStats()
formula: Top-10 Concentration = forecast buyers of the 10 highest categories ÷ total forecast buyers

title: Top Category
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/ml_category_buyer_breadth_forecast/service.py:152-166 (per-category forecast points); top/share computed in dashboard-v2 forecastStats()
formula: Top Category = the category with the highest forecast buyers, with its share = that category's forecast buyers ÷ total forecast buyers

title: High+Medium Tier Pool
formula: High+Medium Tier Pool = count of abandoned carts in the high and medium recovery-score tiers combined (the pool most worth a recovery touch)

title: Avg Recovery Score
formula: Avg Recovery Score = average predicted recovery propensity across all scored abandoned carts

title: Abandoned Carts
formula: Abandoned Carts = count of abandoned carts scored by the recovery model this run

title: Customers Scored
formula: Customers Scored = number of customers who received a category recommendation in the latest scoring run

title: High Confidence
formula: High Confidence = count of scored customers whose predicted top category carries a High confidence tier; share = that count ÷ total customers scored

title: Single Recommendation
formula: Single Recommendation = count of scored customers whose recommendation strategy is a single top-1 category; share = that count ÷ total customers scored

title: 3-Category Basket
formula: 3-Category Basket = count of scored customers whose recommendation strategy serves three categories; share = that count ÷ total customers scored

title: Forecast Buyers (next 4w)
formula: Forecast Buyers (next 4w) = sum of the LightGBM-predicted distinct-buyer (reach) score across every category over the next four weeks (approximate reach, not additive across weeks)

title: Customers Scored
formula: Customers Scored = number of customers with a category purchase-propensity prediction in the latest run

title: High Propensity Pool
formula: High Propensity Pool = count of customers with high-confidence category purchase predictions; share = that count ÷ total customers scored

title: Model AUC
formula: Model AUC = area under the ROC curve for the category purchase-propensity model (offline quality metric read from the artifact; 0.5 = random, 1.0 = perfect)

title: Top Opportunity Category
formula: Top Opportunity Category = the product category with the strongest purchase-propensity signals across all scored customers (read from the precomputed summary artifact)

title: Categories Forecast
formula: Categories Forecast = count of distinct categories that have a next-4-week revenue forecast

title: Forecast Revenue (next 4w)
formula: Forecast Revenue (next 4w) = sum of the LightGBM-predicted revenue across every category over the next four weeks

title: Avg / Category
formula: Avg per Category = total forecast revenue ÷ number of forecast categories

title: Top-10 Concentration
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/ml_category_revenue_forecast/service.py:153-167 (get_forecast per-category points sorted by forecast_revenue); concentration in dashboard-v2 forecastStats()
formula: Top-10 Concentration = forecast revenue of the 10 highest categories ÷ total forecast revenue

title: Top Category
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/ml_category_revenue_forecast/service.py:153-167 (per-category forecast points); top/share in dashboard-v2 forecastStats()
formula: Top Category = the category with the highest forecast revenue, with its share = that category's forecast revenue ÷ total forecast revenue

title: Average Confidence
formula: Average Confidence = mean predicted channel confidence of the preferred channel across all scored customers

title: Channel-Matched Customers
formula: Channel-Matched Customers = count of scored customers whose preferred-channel prediction confidence is above 0.6

title: Multi-Channel Pool
formula: Multi-Channel Pool = count of scored customers whose predicted preferred channel is Multi-channel rather than a single channel

title: Top Channel
formula: Top Channel = the most common predicted preferred marketing channel across all scored customers (most frequent preferred channel)

title: Channels at Saturation
formula: Channels at Saturation = count of channels spending above 80% of their model-estimated optimal budget (current spend ÷ optimal spend > 0.8)

title: Average Churn Probability
formula: Average Churn Probability = mean predicted churn probability across all scored customers, shown as a percentage

title: Churn Rate
formula: Churn Rate = customers whose predicted churn probability clears the at-risk threshold ÷ total customers scored

title: Total CLV at Risk
formula: Total CLV at Risk = sum across customers of (predicted churn probability × predicted customer lifetime value), scaled to the selected horizon

title: Avg Conversion Rate
formula: Avg Conversion Rate = mean of the predicted conversion rate across all offer types

title: Total Customers Scored
formula: Total Customers Scored = count of customers with a valid high-value propensity prediction in this run

title: Declining Customers
formula: Declining Customers = count of customers predicted to move to a lower value trajectory (predicted class downgrade or big_downgrade)

title: Forecast Units (next 4w)
formula: Forecast Units (next 4w) = sum of the LightGBM-predicted unit demand across every product over the next four weeks

title: Avg / Product
formula: Avg per Product = total forecast units ÷ number of forecast products

title: Highest-Demand Product
formula: Highest-Demand Product = the product with the highest forecast units, with its share = that product's forecast units ÷ total forecast units

title: High Responders
formula: High Responders = count of customers in the highest discount-response tier (strongest reactors to promotional pricing)

title: Model AUC
formula: Model AUC = area under the ROC curve for the discount-response classifier on the holdout set (closer to 1.0 means cleaner separation of responders from non-responders)

title: Discount-Responsive Customers
formula: Discount-Responsive Customers = count of customers the model predicts will respond to a discount offer

title: Entry Categories Forecast
formula: Entry Categories Forecast = count of distinct entry categories that carry a next-4-week new-customer forecast

title: Expected Retained Value (ERV)
formula: Expected Retained Value = (1 − average churn probability) × average predicted customer lifetime value × customers scored

title: One-Time Buyers Scored
formula: One-Time Buyers Scored = count of registered first-time buyers scored by the repeat model this run

title: Forecast Accuracy (MAPE)
formula: Forecast Accuracy (MAPE) = mean absolute percentage error of the demand forecasts on the holdout period (lower is better; read from the training artifact)

title: Forecasted Units (90d)
formula: Forecasted Units (90d) = sum of each product's predicted 90-day unit demand across all forecasted products

title: Growth Rate
formula: Growth Rate = flagged growth customers ÷ total scored customers × 100

title: Growth vs Prior Year
formula: Growth vs Prior Year = (forecasted quarter total ÷ actual revenue of the matching weeks 52 weeks earlier − 1) × 100 (blank when fewer than 52 weeks of history exist)

title: Reliable Predictions
formula: Reliable Predictions = count of customers whose prediction confidence-interval width falls in the narrowest (≤25th percentile) quartile

title: High-Growth Products (>20%)
formula: High-Growth Products (>20%) = count of products whose forecasted growth rate exceeds 20%

title: High-Response Pool
formula: High-Response Pool = count of customers whose predicted intervention propensity is at or above 50%

title: High-Risk Customers
formula: High-Risk Customers = count of customers the model places in the High or Critical risk tiers

title: High-Risk Products
formula: High-Risk Products = count of products the model flags at Critical or High stock-out risk

title: High-Propensity Pool
formula: High-Propensity Pool = count of customers scored into the high propensity-to-become-high-value tier

title: Highest YoY Growth Category
formula: Highest YoY Growth Category = the category with the largest year-over-year revenue growth %

title: Immediate Action (<7d)
formula: Immediate Action (<7d) = count of Critical/High-risk products projected to stock out within the next 7 days

title: Total Incremental Revenue
formula: Total Incremental Revenue = sum of incremental revenue the Bayesian MMM credits to paid channels (in-sample attribution, baseline/organic excluded)

title: Mean Propensity Score
formula: Mean Propensity Score = average predicted intervention propensity across all scored customers, shown as a percentage

title: Top-Decile Pool (Loyalist Likely)
formula: Top-Decile Pool = count of first-time buyers in the highest repeat-propensity segment ('loyalist_likely')

title: Markdown-Ready Now
formula: Markdown-Ready Now = count of products the model flags with markdown urgency = 'Now'

title: Typical Prediction Range
formula: Typical Prediction Range = median width of the prediction confidence interval across scored customers (in dollars)

title: Average Confidence
formula: Average Confidence = mean predicted confidence (softmax probability) of each customer's winning message archetype across all scored customers

title: Total Customers Segmented
formula: Total Customers Segmented = number of customers the message-affinity model assigned a preferred message archetype to in the latest run

title: High-Confidence Pool
formula: High-Confidence Pool = count of scored customers whose winning message archetype scored above 50% predicted probability

title: Top Message Type
formula: Top Message Type = the most common predicted preferred message archetype across all scored customers (most frequent winning archetype)

title: Model AUC
formula: Model AUC = area under the ROC curve for the high-value propensity classifier on the holdout set (0.5 = random, closer to 1.0 = cleaner separation)

title: Off-Peak Revenue at Risk
formula: Off-Peak Revenue at Risk = sum of each category's weakest-month (trough) revenue, across all categories

title: High-Priority Pool
formula: High-Priority Pool = count of customers ranked into the highest-priority tier for offers at the selected horizon

title: High-Priority Share
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/offer_value_lift_predictions/ml_service.py:174-184 (high_priority_pool over n_customers); priority breakdown pct at get_priority_breakdown
formula: High-Priority Share = high-priority pool ÷ customers scored × 100

title: Customers Scored
formula: Customers Scored = total population the response-score ranker scored for the selected horizon

title: Offer-Segment Match Rate
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/offer_type_response_predictions/ml_service.py:170-172 (matched = sum(1 for r in seg_list if r['recommended_match']); rate = matched/len(seg_list))
formula: Offer-Segment Match Rate = fraction of segment-offer cells flagged as a recommended match in the segment heatmap

title: Top-Decile Concentration
formula: Top-Decile Concentration = top-decile mean response score ÷ overall mean response score (how many times stronger the top 10% of customers' scores are versus the average)

title: Optimal Budget — Top Channel
formula: Optimal Budget — Top Channel = the largest recommended budget across channels in the model's optimal allocation

title: Optimal Discount Range
formula: Optimal Discount Range = the model's metadata range, else the revenue-maximizing discount ± 2.5 percentage points — the band expected to maximise net revenue

title: Organic Revenue
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/ml_marketing_mix/service.py:328,333 (get_executive_kpis: organic_revenue = total_revenue - total_paid_revenue; returned as max(0, organic_revenue))
formula: Organic Revenue = max(0, total revenue − model-attributed paid revenue) — the baseline revenue not driven by paid media

title: Peak Response Hour
formula: Peak Response Hour = the most common predicted best-response hour (0–23) across customers (mode of each customer's best hour)

title: Peak Response Rate
formula: Peak Response Rate = the highest predicted response rate across all discount depths in the response curves

title: Peak Season Category
formula: Peak Season Category = the category whose single highest monthly seasonality index is the largest across all categories

title: Peak Week
formula: Peak Week = the largest single-week forecast revenue across the 13-week horizon, with the week it falls in

title: Personalization Opportunity
formula: Personalization Opportunity = count of customers with a confident, distinct best send time (flagged high-confidence timing)

title: Predicted New High-Value
formula: Predicted New High-Value = count of customers the model expects to cross into high-value status

title: High-Value Targets
formula: High-Value Targets = count of customers the model places in the Premium value tier

title: Avg WTP Score
formula: Avg WTP Score = mean predicted willingness-to-pay score (0–1) across all scored customers

title: Budget Customers
formula: Budget Customers = count of scored customers the model assigns to the Budget price tier

title: Premium Customers
formula: Premium Customers = count of scored customers the model assigns to the Premium price tier

title: Value Seekers
formula: Value Seekers = count of scored customers the model assigns to the Value price tier

title: Avg Elasticity Coefficient
formula: Avg Elasticity Coefficient = mean predicted price-elasticity coefficient across all scored products (values below −1 indicate broadly price-sensitive demand)

title: Highly Elastic Products
formula: Highly Elastic Products = count of products whose predicted elasticity coefficient is below −1.0 (a small price change moves demand sharply)

title: Inelastic Products
formula: Inelastic Products = count of products whose predicted elasticity coefficient is between −1.0 and 0 (demand relatively insensitive to price)

title: Revenue Sensitivity Score
formula: Revenue Sensitivity Score = mean of (absolute predicted elasticity × each product's revenue weight) across products — a revenue-weighted measure of how exposed revenue is to price changes

title: High-Propensity Pool
formula: High-Propensity Pool = count of prospects the model places in the top 'priority' activation tier (highest first-purchase propensity)

title: Customers Scored
formula: Customers Scored = number of customers who received a product affinity recommendation in the latest scoring run

title: High Affinity Pool
formula: High Affinity Pool = count of scored customers whose top product recommendation carries a High confidence tier

title: Hit Rate @3
formula: Hit Rate @3 = share of customers whose actually-purchased product appeared in the model's top-3 recommendations (offline evaluation metric read from the model artifact)

title: Top Recommended Product
formula: Top Recommended Product = the single product most frequently predicted as a customer's top-1 product across all scored customers (most common top product)

title: Forecast Revenue (next 4w)
formula: Forecast Revenue (next 4w) = sum of the LightGBM-predicted revenue across every product over the next four weeks

title: Products Forecast
formula: Products Forecast = count of distinct products that have a next-4-week units forecast

title: Products Forecasted
formula: Products Forecasted = count of products the demand model produced a forecast for in this run

title: Projected Incremental Revenue
formula: Projected Incremental Revenue = the additional revenue the model expects from reallocating spend to its recommended budget mix versus the current allocation

title: Projected Margin Recovery
formula: Projected Margin Recovery = sum of the model's projected margin recovery across the markdown-urgency = 'Now' products

title: Quarter Range (80% PI)
formula: Quarter Range (80% PI) = [sum of weekly lower bounds, sum of weekly upper bounds] of the 80% prediction interval across the 13 horizon weeks

title: Forecast Quarter Total
formula: Forecast Quarter Total = sum of point-forecast weekly revenue across the next 13 weeks

title: Reallocation Upside
formula: Reallocation Upside = (optimizer's expected daily response ÷ current daily response − 1) × 100 — extra revenue from shifting the same total budget toward higher-marginal-return channels

title: Avg Repeat Propensity
formula: Avg Repeat Propensity = average predicted probability that a first-time buyer makes a repeat purchase, across all scored first-time buyers

title: Median Repeat Propensity
formula: Median Repeat Propensity = midpoint of the repeat-purchase propensity distribution across scored first-time buyers (half score higher, half lower)

title: Retained Revenue Forecast
formula: Retained Revenue Forecast = (1 − average churn probability) × average predicted customer lifetime value × customers scored, shown as the retained share of total predicted revenue

title: Retention Rate
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/churn_analysis/ml_service.py:294-310 (retention is complement of high_risk_pct/churn_rate); registry depends_on churn_rate+churn_probability
formula: Retention Rate = 1 − churn rate (the share of customers expected to stay over the horizon)

title: Revenue-Maximizing Discount
formula: Revenue-Maximizing Discount = the discount depth of the row with the highest net revenue (uplift minus discount cost)

title: Revenue at Stockout Risk
formula: Revenue at Stockout Risk = sum of the revenue-at-risk across all Critical/High-risk products

title: Avg / Product
formula: Avg per Product = total forecast revenue ÷ number of forecast products

title: Top Product
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/ml_product_revenue_forecast/service.py:179-197 (per-product forecast points); top/share in dashboard-v2 forecastStats()
formula: Top Product = the product with the highest forecast revenue, with its share = that product's forecast revenue ÷ total forecast revenue

title: Revenue per Top Offer
formula: Revenue per Top Offer = the revenue attributable to the top-converting offer type

title: Revenue Protected
formula: Revenue Protected = count of customers predicted NOT to need a discount to convert (would buy at full price, so exclude from discounting)

title: Revenue Uplift vs No Markdown
formula: Revenue Uplift vs No Markdown = model-estimated revenue gain from following the optimal markdown plan versus no markdown action (read from the training artifact)

title: Seasonal Sensitivity
formula: Seasonal Sensitivity = average of each customer's seasonal responsiveness index — how much customer response swings with the season

title: Stable High-Value
formula: Stable High-Value = count of top-tier customers (High, VIP or Whale segment) predicted to hold their value (trajectory class 'hold')

title: Stage Transition Rate
formula: Stage Transition Rate = (customers predicted to improve stage + customers predicted to decline stage) ÷ total customers scored

title: Top Converting Offer
formula: Top Converting Offer = the offer type with the highest predicted conversion rate across all offer types

title: Top Growth Driver
formula: Top Growth Driver = the model feature with the highest gain in the grow-probability model (top-ranked feature-importance entry, humanized for display)

title: Top Intervention Type
formula: Top Intervention Type = the intervention trigger category (e.g. Abandoned Browse / Checkout / Cart) with the highest customer count across scored customers

title: Forecast Revenue
formula: Forecast Revenue = sum of predicted next-cycle order value across all scored customers

title: Total Prospects
formula: Total Prospects = count of prospects (not-yet-first-purchase customers) scored by the activation model this run

title: Total Recommended Budget
formula: Total Recommended Budget = sum of the recommended budgets across all channels under the model's optimal allocation

title: Total Revenue
source_code_ref: backend/app/features/ml_marketing_mix/service.py:324-327 (get_executive_kpis: organic_pct from dashboard_summary.json; total_revenue = total_paid_revenue / (1 - organic_pct))
formula: Total Revenue = model-attributed paid revenue ÷ (1 − organic revenue share) — paid revenue grossed up by the model's organic share so paid + organic sum to the whole

title: Customers Scored
formula: Customers Scored = total number of customers the value-trajectory model scored this run

title: Model Accuracy
formula: Model Accuracy = top-1 classification accuracy of the trajectory model on the holdout set (how often the predicted class matched the actual outcome)

title: Untapped Low-Spenders
formula: Untapped Low-Spenders = count of growth-flagged customers in the lowest historical AOV (spend) tier

title: Watch Pool
formula: Watch Pool = count of prospects in the middle 'watch' activation tier (moderate first-purchase likelihood)

title: Top Spenders
formula: Top Spenders = count of customers flagged as whale targets — predicted high-value orders among the very top spenders
